---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for LexiPath
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's missing or frustrating in the current app?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. How would it work from the user's perspective?

## Alternatives considered

Have you found any workarounds or alternative approaches?

## Additional context

Any mockups, screenshots, or links that help illustrate the idea.
